prerequisites: An Alpaca account with Broker API access. Broker API is Alpaca's product for building investment and trading apps on behalf of end users.
A Broker API key pair (an API key ID and a corresponding API secret key) generated for your account. The key ID is used as the `username` and the secret key as the `password` for this connector.
Decide which `environment` to connect to: the sandbox for testing or production for live data.
A `start_date` to bound the initial sync window for incremental streams.

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic authentication (API key ID and secret key)
authMethods.summary: The Alpaca Broker API authenticates with HTTP Basic Auth using your API key ID and API secret key. Set the connector `username` field to your API key ID and the `password` secret field to your API secret key. Alpaca forms the Authorization header by base64-encoding the `API_KEY:API_SECRET` string, so this connector only needs the two raw values.

setupSteps.title: Obtain Broker API credentials
setupSteps.body: Sign up for or sign in to your Alpaca account and open the Broker API dashboard. Generate an API key pair for the Broker API; you will receive an API key ID and an API secret key. Store the secret key securely, since it is shown only at creation time.

setupSteps.title: Choose the environment
setupSteps.body: Set the required `environment` field to select the target Alpaca environment. Use the sandbox to test the integration without sending real trades, and use production for live data. Make sure the API key pair you provide belongs to the same environment you select.

setupSteps.title: Provide the credentials
setupSteps.body: Enter your API key ID in the required `username` field and your API secret key in the `password` secret field. These map directly to the Basic Auth username and password that Alpaca expects.

setupSteps.title: Configure the sync window and paging
setupSteps.body: Set the required `start_date` to define the beginning of the data window for incremental streams. Optionally set `limit` to control the number of records requested per page. Leave `limit` unset to use the connector default.

sources.title: Getting Started with Broker API - Alpaca Docs
